seoTitle: Alderley vs Aldershot — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Alderley and Aldershot. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Alderley and Aldershot.
heading: Alderley vs Aldershot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alderley, Queensland and Aldershot, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alderley has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Aldershot (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Alderley or Aldershot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alderley has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Aldershot scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alderley scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Aldershot scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alderley or Aldershot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alderley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
